svg.title: A2M interval decoding and sub-frame timing
svg.desc: Conceptual interval score matrix with a Viterbi path and exact sub-frame timing equation from A2M's event refinement.
svg.text: From interval scores to precisely timed events
The scorer proposes spans, dynamic programming selects a path, and the attribute model refines the timing.
Bright cells are high-scoring start/end pairs. The selected non-overlapping path
maximizes interval evidence together with skip/noise evidence.

g.aria-label: Backward path score recurrence with skip and take interval cases

svg.text: q(t,p): best score from t onward · n(t,p): skip/noise score · S(e,t,p): interval score from t to e · p: one of 90 tracks · [d]₊ = max(d, 0)

g.aria-label: Refined onset time equals frame index plus onset offset times hop size, divided by sample rate

svg.text: The heatmap is illustrative; tensor dimensions, recurrence rules, frame duration, and refinement range follow the current implementation in piano_engine.py.
